search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20062` direction=inbound $blocked_flows$ | search $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | eval location_cc = if(direction=="inbound",src_cc,"") | iplocation src_ip $geo_ip$ | search Country!="" | geostats globallimit=0 sum(flow_count) by src_ip

`netflow_search_rule_20062` direction=outbound $blocked_flows$ | search $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | eval location_cc = if(direction=="outbound",dest_cc,"") | iplocation dest_ip $geo_ip$ | search Country!="" | geostats globallimit=0 sum(flow_count) by dest_ip

`netflow_search_rule_20062` $blocked_flows$ | search $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | fillnull value=0 bytes_out | fillnull value="" src_cc dest_cc src_host src_vm_name dest_host dest_vm_name | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | stats sum(bytes) as TrafficAmount sum(flow_count) as Connections sum(bytes_in) as sndbytes sum(bytes_out) as rcvbytes by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_vm_name dest_ip dest_host dest_vm_name src_cc dest_cc direction | sort - TrafficAmount | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval sndMB=sndbytes/1024/1024 | eval rcvMB=rcvbytes/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, sndMB)` | `commas_formatting(MB Received, rcvMB)` | `commas_formatting(Flow Count, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | fillnull value="" src_host src_vm_name dest_host dest_vm_name | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | eval src_host=if(src_vm_name=="",src_host,src_host." (".src_vm_name.")") | eval dest_host=if(dest_vm_name=="",dest_host,dest_host." (".dest_vm_name.")") | eval location_ip = if(direction=="inbound",src_ip,if(direction=="outbound",dest_ip,"")) | eval location_cc = if(direction=="inbound",src_cc,if(direction=="outbound",dest_cc,"")) | iplocation location_ip $geo_ip$ | search Country!="" | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name direction src_ip src_host dest_ip dest_host Country "MB Sent" "MB Received" "Flow Count" "Total Traffic MB" | rename exp_ip_name as Device | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename src_host as "Source Host (VM)" | rename dest_ip as "Dest. IP" | rename dest_host as "Dest. Host (VM)" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename direction as "Direction"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
